subtitles.english: More than I had imagined...
I can't smile properly...
But even more than that,
the world is so gentle.
One day, a wind was born
at the place where footprints begin.

subtitles.original: あの日の未来が帰って
subtitles.english: Even if the future from that day returns
and starts running...
I would still end up right here, wouldn't I?
This scenery...
and this voice...
everything that colors my life.
As for the direction,
I still...
don't know it yet, but...
I will just go where the wind blows.

subtitles.original: ねえ いつから気づいてたの？
subtitles.english: Tell me, since when did you know?

subtitles.original: まるで私のこと全部お見通しで
subtitles.english: It's like you can see right through everything about me.

subtitles.original: 苦し紛れにごまかした嘘も
subtitles.english: Even the lies I used to scrape by...

subtitles.original: 君にはバレてたのかな
subtitles.english: I wonder if you had them all figured out.
An ordinary, boring,
yawn-filled,

subtitles.original: 変化のないありふれてる時間
subtitles.english: and unchanging routine time...

subtitles.original: 想像していただけじゃ
subtitles.english: If I just kept imagining things,
nothing would change.
But even more than that,
even more than I predicted,
look,

subtitles.original: 新しい風が吹いてきて
subtitles.english: a new wind has started to blow.
And my clumsy self...
started to feel quite precious to me.
Someday, when the wind stops...
at the place where footprints fade away...

subtitles.original: 落とし物探して 拾って
subtitles.english: I'll search for lost things and pick them up.
Since I managed to find them,
I must be standing right here.
Softly,
my hair flutters in the wind.
Someday, the wind dreamed...
of the place where it meets the blue sky.

subtitles.original: 回り道選んで 迷って
subtitles.english: Choosing detours and getting lost...
even if I stumble along the way,
I will still make my way there.
This scenery...
and this voice...
everything that colors my life...
With my own hands,
I will hold onto them tightly.
More than I ever imagined,
at a freer pace.
As for the direction,
I still...
don't know it yet, but...
I will just go where the wind blows.

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで、ありがとうございました！
subtitles.english: And with that, thank you so much!

subtitles.original: よいしょ。みんな、すっかり忘れてると思うけど
subtitles.english: Alright! I think everyone has completely forgotten, but...

subtitles.original: 今日これ、これから、記念撮影します！
subtitles.english: today, we are going to take a commemorative photo!

subtitles.original: そう、お土産があるって言ったっしょ？
subtitles.english: That's right! I said there would be a souvenir, right?

subtitles.original: これこれ、いや、ちょっと待って、マジで自撮り棒
subtitles.english: This, this... No, wait a minute. Seriously, this selfie stick...

subtitles.original: これリハーサルでめっちゃ練習したのに！
subtitles.english: Even though I practiced with it so much in rehearsal!

subtitles.original: 自撮り棒下手。あ、いい感じいい感じ。
subtitles.english: I'm bad with selfie sticks. Oh, this is good, this is good.
Click!

subtitles.original: よし。いけてそう、いけてそう。
subtitles.english: Alright, looks like it worked, looks like it worked.
Okay!

subtitles.original: はい！というわけで皆さん
subtitles.english: So, everyone!

subtitles.original: 今日お土産ありって言いましたね？
subtitles.english: I did say there would be a souvenir today, right?

subtitles.original: そうなんです。今日撮った、今この風真がね、自撮り棒で撮った写真が
subtitles.english: That's right. The picture that I, Kazama, just took with the selfie stick...

subtitles.original: コンビニで、なんとプリントアウトできます！
subtitles.english: can actually be printed out at convenience stores!
That's amazing!

subtitles.original: はい、こちらですね、対象店舗、ファミリーマートさん、ローソンさん、ミニストップさんで
subtitles.english: Yes, this one. Available at FamilyMart, Lawson, and Ministop...

subtitles.original: 本日21時から、ネットで事前購入ができます。
subtitles.english: you can pre-purchase online starting from 9 PM today.

subtitles.original: お値段がですね、税込300円とのことで、
subtitles.english: The price is 300 yen including tax, and...

subtitles.original: 印刷できるのは、明日6月19日の20時からになっております。
subtitles.english: you will be able to print it starting tomorrow, June 19th, from 8 PM.

subtitles.original: 写真にはですね、複製手書きメッセージ、この後書きますんで。
subtitles.english: On the photo, there will be a printed handwritten message, which I'll write after this.

subtitles.original: はい、どんな写真が撮れているか、写真下手くそでも怒らないでね？
subtitles.english: So please look forward to it. And don't get mad if the photo turned out bad, okay?

subtitles.original: 内容は買ってから確認してください。
subtitles.english: Please check the content after you buy it.
I mean, isn't that amazing?

subtitles.original: ちょっと一足早く皆さんのもとに、手元に残るライブのお土産が用意できればということで
subtitles.english: I really wanted to prepare a physical live concert souvenir that you can hold onto,

subtitles.original: 今回やらせていただきました。お土産あります！
subtitles.english: so we put this together. Enjoy your souvenir!

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation Project: A Detailed Review**

Alright, let's break this down. My primary goal here is to generate subtitles for this video of Kazama Iroha. It's a singing performance followed by some casual talk. I've taken a very detailed, frame-by-frame approach. I'm focusing on the timing, accuracy, and natural language translation of the subtitles.

First, the song. I've meticulously transcribed the lyrics, cross-referencing the on-screen display with my own listening. I'm noting the exact timestamps for each line. I started at the beginning, noting the visual clues. After noting all lyrics, I refined the timing of each line.

The first section is the song itself. The lyrics are: "More than I imagined, I can't smile properly, but even more than that, the world is so gentle. One day, a wind was born at the place where footprints begin. Even if the future from that day returns and starts running, I would still end up right here, wouldn't I? This scenery, and this voice, everything that colors my life. As for the direction, I still don't know it yet, but I will just go where the wind blows."

Then, I identified a musical break, that's easy.

Now the song continued: "Tell me, since when did you know? It's like you can see right through everything about me. Even the lies I used to scrape by, I wonder if you had them all figured out. An ordinary, boring, yawn-filled, and unchanging routine time... If I just kept imagining things, nothing would change. But even more than that, even more than I predicted, look, a new wind has started to blow. And my clumsy self, started to feel quite precious to me."

"Someday, when the wind stops at the place where footprints fade away, I'll search for lost things and pick them up. Since I managed to find them, I must be standing right here. Softly, my hair flutters in the wind. Someday, the wind dreamed of the place where it meets the blue sky. Choosing detours and getting lost, even if I stumble along the way, I will still make my way there. This scenery, and this voice, everything that colors my life... With my own hands, I will hold onto them tightly. More than I ever imagined, at a freer pace. As for the direction, I still don't know it yet, but I will just go where the wind blows."

Now the second part, the talking segment. I approached it with the same level of attention to detail, carefully transcribing and timing each spoken phrase. I had to double-check my transcriptions to be sure I got everything correct. I paid careful attention to the nuances of the speech, adjusting to be sure the English translations are natural.

Here's the talking part. I identified a transition into the outro.

*   "And with that, thank you so much! Alright! I think everyone has completely forgotten, but today, we are going to take a commemorative photo! That's right! I said there would be a souvenir, right? This, this... No, wait a minute. Seriously, this selfie stick... Even though I practiced with it so much in rehearsal! I'm bad with selfie sticks. Oh, this is good, this is good. Click! Alright, looks like it worked, looks like it worked. Okay! So, everyone! I did say there would be a souvenir today, right? That's right. The picture that I, Kazama, just took with the selfie stick can actually be printed out at convenience stores! That's amazing! Yes, this one. Available at FamilyMart, Lawson, and Ministop... you can pre-purchase online starting from 9 PM today. The price is 300 yen including tax, and you will be able to print it starting tomorrow, June 19th, from 8 PM. On the photo, there will be a printed handwritten message, which I'll write after this. So please look forward to it. And don't get mad if the photo turned out bad, okay? Please check the content after you buy it. I mean, isn't that amazing? I really wanted to prepare a physical live concert souvenir that you can hold onto, so we put this together. Enjoy your souvenir!"

Now, all I need to do is structure this into the subtitle format. I'm confident that these timings and translations are rock-solid. Let's get to it.
